untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'success rates' (success_rate_bull, success_rate_bear), 'average rise/decline percentages', 'failure rates', and specific throwback/pullback/gap behavior that cannot be expressed as entry/exit conditions without access to pattern identification engine and historical performance statistics. The original source text is incomplete (cut off mid-sentence). Market regime detection (bull vs bear) is not available in standard indicators; closest match is TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN. Specific success rate thresholds are AUTHOR_SILENT.
translation_notes: Translated as generic breakout pattern using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for chart pattern breakouts with volume confirmation. Entry conditions assume both LONG and SHORT directions based on CONTEXT_DEPENDENT flag. Exit uses mean reversion to dc_middle as reversal condition since author provided no exit guidance. Market condition discrimination (bull/bear) mapped to TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN regimes as closest available proxy. Throwback/pullback/gap effects on performance cannot be encoded without pattern-specific logic or performance database.
